title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.110 - Power to compel attendance of witnesses
text:
515.110.  Power to compel attendance of witnesses. — They shall have the same power that may be given by law to associate circuit judges, to issue subpoenas for witnesses, and to compel their attendance by attachment, to administer oaths, and punish contempts committed in their presence during the hearing of the cause, and commit to the jail of the county such witnesses as refuse to testify.
(RSMo 1939 § 1149) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 983; 1919 § 1433; 1909 § 2003
